verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified the unanimous agreement among all agents. The synthesis accurately summarizes the specific visual markers (green wire mesh fencing, rolling garage shutters, concrete drainage gutters) that point to Japan, despite the absence of hard constraints like road signs or license plates.
